plugins.name: unifi
plugins.description: UniFi network intelligence — topology, health, WiFi, clients, security

plugins.name: opnsense
plugins.description: OPNsense gateway intelligence — firewall, routing, VPN, DNS, IDS/IPS

plugins.name: netex
plugins.description: Cross-vendor network orchestration — unified topology, VLAN provisioning, security audit

plugins.name: cisco
plugins.description: Cisco network intelligence — switch management, VLANs, port config, MAC table, LLDP topology via SSH (Netmiko)

plugins.name: talos
plugins.description: Talos Linux Kubernetes cluster intelligence — cluster lifecycle, node management, etcd, diagnostics via talosctl CLI
